fields.label: Personal API Key
fields.helpText: From PostHog -> Settings -> Personal API Keys

fields.label: Project API Key
fields.helpText: Optional: project token for event ingestion

fields.label: Host
fields.helpText: Defaults to us.posthog.com. Use eu.posthog.com for EU cloud.

healthcheck_config.description: Validates personal API key via projects endpoint

metadata.summary: PostHog product analytics, feature flags, session replay, and A/B testing.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Log in to PostHog and go to Settings -> Personal API Keys
2. Click 'Create personal API key' and name it
3. Copy the phx_... key
4. Optionally note your Project ID from Project Settings
5. Paste the API key (and project ID if needed) here
